page: lessons/03-the-one-rule/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

message.content:
1 Corinthians 4:38-760 (2Kings) | Forgiveness is shown when a man repents from sin with his whole heart and confesses to God.  
John 5:14-2291 (Luke) | If you forgive people, your heavenly Father will forgive you too.  
Matthew 18:34-760 (Ephesians) | Forgive others as much as they have forgiven you in the past and you shall be truly free from them.  
Mark 5:296 (John) | Forgiveness is shown when a man repents with his whole heart, confessing to God for all sins he committed against him or her before He had mercy on him.  
Luke 17:3-460 (Ephesians) | Forgive others as much as they have forgiven you in the past and you shall be truly free from them too.
